description_long: This sculpture depicts a simplified, stylized human figure standing upright with its arms held together in front of its chest. The figure has a rounded head with minimal facial features and a smooth, continuous surface, giving it an abstract and primitive appearance. The body proportions are somewhat exaggerated, with a broad torso and short legs, and the hands are merged together, lacking individual fingers. The surface is dark gray with subtle variations in tone, suggesting it is made from stone or a similar material. The back of the figure is slightly hunched, and the overall form is solid and monolithic. There are no visible inscriptions, adornments, or separate components.
description: A dark gray, abstract human figure sculpture with arms held together in front and minimal facial features. The form is solid, smooth, and monolithic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, arms held together at the chest, and the full frontal outline of the body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the curvature of the back, and the arms pressed to the torso.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and legs, with no visible details on the back.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side profile and the rounded form of the figure.
attribute_location_context: No visible context or environmental cues are present in the images.
